findings.evidence: `AmbientIsotopyClassReparam.lean:45` defines `precompHomeomorphEquiv`; `AmbientIsotopyClass.lean:214` already defines `postcompHomeomorphEquiv`; `AmbientIsotopyClassReparam.lean:119` proves the new map equals `postcompHomeomorph h (precompHomeomorphEquiv e x)`, confirming it is the composite.
findings.fix: Define it as `(precompHomeomorphEquiv e).trans (postcompHomeomorphEquiv h)` and keep the representative/factorization simp lemmas as consequences.
findings.issue: `postcompHomeomorphPrecompEquiv` reproves a special combined coordinate-change equivalence with duplicated inverse proofs, even though it is just source reparametrisation followed by the existing ambient-homeomorphism equivalence.

summary: The source-homeomorphism equivalence is at the natural level, but the two-sided equivalence duplicates the composition of the two one-sided equivalences instead of deriving the special case from the general API.
